## Outcome

What observable change does this PR make? Lead with the result, not the mechanism.

## Scope

- [ ] Single concern (skill content, tooling, or CI, not bundled).
- [ ] If it changes an output contract, the Zod schema and tests are updated.
- [ ] If it adds a mascot asset, it passes the originality checklist and includes a divergence note.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (typecheck + tests + JSON + SVG).
- [ ] Paste the relevant output or name the gates that ran.

## Linked issues

Closes #
